description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized gemtuzumab ozogamicin in combination with cytarabine and daunorubicin for the treatment of patients aged 15 years and above with previously untreated, de novo CD33-positive acute myeloid leukemia (AML), except acute promyelocytic leukaemia (APL).

contributions.description: Adding EMA approvals for use to database

contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

indication.indication: MYLOTARG is indicated for combination therapy with daunorubicin (DNR) and cytarabine (AraC) for the treatment of patients aged 15 years and above with previously untreated, de novo CD33-positive acute myeloid leukaemia (AML), except acute promyelocytic leukaemia (APL).
